message:
fix: remove Dolt branch merge step from gt done

Polecats now use transaction-based shared main, so the Dolt branch merge
step is no longer needed. Removes MergePolecatBranch call, mergeFailed
variable, CheckpointDoltMerged constant, and related test cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
